cerez_politikasi2: As with many other websites, we use cookies to personalize content and ads, analyze traffic, and understand how you use our website (referred to as 'dklist'). We have created our cookie policy to provide information about the cookies used on dklist and the choices you can make regarding them. Our cookie policy is part of our privacy policy.
cerez_politikasi3: During your time on dklist, cookies and similar elements, also known as 'cookies,' may be placed in your browser. By continuing to use dklist without changing your cookie settings, you consent to the use of cookies.
cerez_politikasi5: Cookies are simple text files placed in your browser by the websites you visit and do not contain personal information or identifiers. While these cookies do not contain personal information, they can store session information and similar data anonymously to recognize you again and provide similar services.
cerez_politikasi6: 2. What Types of Cookies Do We Use?
cerez_politikasi7: We use two types of cookies on dklist: 'session cookies' and 'persistent cookies.' Session cookies are temporary cookies stored in your device's memory while you browse dklist but are deleted when you close your web browser. Persistent cookies are stored on your hard drive until a specified date or duration, or until you delete them.
cerez_politikasi8: 3. What Types of Cookies Do Third Parties Use on dklist?
cerez_politikasi9: In addition to our own cookies, third-party ('third party') suppliers and advertising networks, social media platforms, and other partners may place cookies in your browser to provide you with better and more personalized services, including displaying ads based on your previous visits to dklist and other websites. Here is information about these third parties and the cookies they use:
cerez_politikasi11: By using persistent, session, and third-party cookie types, dklist's traffic is monitored and analyzed to better understand user experience. For more information, visit: http://www.google.com/policies/privacy/ (We are not responsible for the content you access through the provided links.) To opt out of these cookies, visit: https://tools.google.com/dlpage/gaoptout (We are not responsible for the content you access through the provided links.)
cerez_politikasi13: By analyzing the time you spend online and your habits using persistent, session, and third-party cookie types, online experiences are improved, and ads are displayed based on your interests.
cerez_politikasi14: For more information, visit: http://www.google.com/policies/privacy/ (We are not responsible for the content you access through the provided links.) To opt out of these cookies, visit: https://www.google.com/settings/u/0/ads/authenticated (We are not responsible for the content you access through the provided links.)
cerez_politikasi15: To opt out of these cookies, visit: https://www.google.com/settings/u/0/ads/authenticated (We are not responsible for the reliability of the content you will access through the provided links.)
cerez_politikasi17: By using persistent, session, and third-party cookie types to analyze the time you spend online and your habits, ads are displayed based on your interests.
cerez_politikasi18: 4. What Purposes Are Cookies Used for on dklist?
cerez_politikasi19: Cookies on dklist are generally used to provide you with better and more personalized services and to help improve dklist. These cookies allow us to achieve the following goals:
cerez_politikasi20: a. Recognize you when you return to dklist
cerez_politikasi21: b. Reach the targeted audience for ads, allowing you to see ads that match your interests and preventing you from seeing the same ads repeatedly
cerez_politikasi24: e. Understand how you use dklist
cerez_politikasi25: 5. How Can You Manage or Delete Cookies?
cerez_politikasi26: a. You can manage cookies by adjusting your browser settings if your browser allows it. This way, you can reject all cookies, receive warnings before a cookie is stored on your hard drive, accept cookies only from specific websites, disable or delete cookies you have previously accepted.
cerez_politikasi27: b. If third parties on dklist offer the option, you can opt out by visiting the respective third party's website.
cerez_politikasi28: c. If you reject cookies on dklist, you may not be able to use some of dklist's features and functions.
cerez_politikasi29: d. If you access dklist from different browsers and/or devices, you should check the cookie settings for each of these to ensure they align with your preferences.
cerez_politikasi30: We may update our cookie policy without prior notice. Therefore, it is recommended to review our cookie policy at regular intervals.
gizlilik_politikasi2: While using Dklist, we store and use various information about you. We have tried to explain where and how we use this information under the Privacy Policy heading. Because your privacy and your peace of mind when using Dklist are important to us. Additionally, you can choose which data to share with whom from your privacy settings.
gizlilik_politikasi4: We record many activities you perform when using Dklist.
gizlilik_politikasi6: When you register with Dklist, you create a profile by providing information such as your name, surname, date of birth, gender, school and work information, your location, and more. Additionally, by marking the books you've read and liked, you provide information.
gizlilik_politikasi7: Information We Collect in the Background
gizlilik_politikasi8: While you browse Dklist, we record information about how you do it, for example, when you view a book page. This information is automatically obtained and includes log data such as the pages you viewed, the duration of your visits, data obtained through cookies, your location, your browser type and language, your device model, and more.
gizlilik_politikasi9: How Do We Use This Information?
gizlilik_politikasi10: a. We process your personal data in accordance with this privacy policy and the Personal Data Protection Law, Law No. 5651 on Regulation of Publications on the Internet and Combatting Crimes Committed through These Publications, Law No. 5846 on Intellectual and Artistic Works, and Law No. 5237, among other relevant legislation, to fulfill our obligations. We process your data to provide you with better services.
gizlilik_politikasi11: b. We may store your data on systems located in Turkey and abroad.
gizlilik_politikasi12: c. We do not share your personal data with third parties for any reason other than our legal obligations. For details on non-personal data, please refer to the Terms of Use of the Site.
gizlilik_politikasi14: a. Due to our legal obligations, we retain your IP records and similar information for 12 months. These records are automatically deleted after 12 months.
gizlilik_politikasi15: b. While you are on Dklist, the placement of cookies and similar elements in your browser may be possible. For detailed information, please visit our cookie policy.
gizlilik_politikasi16: c. We may update our privacy policy without prior notice. Therefore, we recommend reviewing our privacy policy at regular intervals.

site_kullanim35: Dklist is an application used by millions of people and contains millions of product listings. Most of Dklist users are trustworthy individuals. Buying and selling on the internet has been used safely for many years in both Turkey and around the world. Just like any other transaction, you should take necessary precautions against fraudulent individuals when buying and selling things online.
site_kullanim36: Our number one priority is always the safety and satisfaction of our users. We want you to have a great shopping experience when buying and selling your books on Dklist. Before starting a new book search or posting listings for books you no longer need, we recommend reading the following suggestions:
site_kullanim37: Please pay attention to following the rules recommended by authorities to protect yourself and others.
site_kullanim38: We recommend meeting in a public place when completing the payment and product exchange process. For example: cafe, supermarket, shopping center, etc. Be very cautious of users who cannot or refuse to meet face-to-face, or insist on methods other than cash payment. Never send payment to someone you have not met in person and never buy something without seeing it.
site_kullanim39: In cases where there is a significant amount of book buying or selling, sometimes you may need to meet in a home environment. In such cases, we recommend having someone else with you.
site_kullanim40: Do not accept checks from banks. Do not send money to other users via Western Union, EFT, or bank transfer.
site_kullanim41: Be wary of users making unusual requests or spam-like messages. For example, a user promising to send a check higher than the product's price (this is a common scam found on many websites).
site_kullanim42: There are many attractive opportunities on Dklist, but be cautious of products with prices that seem too good to be true, photos that look like they're taken from a catalog, or products that do not appear to have been photographed by the user. If a product seems unrealistically good, it's probably not real.
site_kullanim43: The best way to complete a transaction is to make the product delivery and payment simultaneously. Never agree to make a prepayment via bank transfer or credit card to avoid fraud.
site_kullanim44: Do not trust people who make unusual requests or send messages that look like spam.
site_kullanim45: Do not share your personal financial information when buying or selling.
site_kullanim46: Do not accept bank checks or bank transfers. These methods are highly susceptible to fraud.
site_kullanim47: We recommend communicating with other users only through Dklist's chat system.
site_kullanim48: If you have doubts about a user's honesty, suspect they are bothering other users, or engaged in spamming activities, you should find another seller/buyer. There are millions of other users on Dklist!
site_kullanim49: Always check the seller's profile page (the same applies to potential buyers).
site_kullanim50: Make sure that information about the product's condition, price, and payment method has been definitively agreed upon before the meeting. If a user struggles to answer simple questions about the product, find another seller.
site_kullanim51: Inspect the product and ensure that everything matches the seller's description before making the payment.
site_kullanim52: Always check the product before purchasing it.
site_kullanim53: Dklist aims to make the platform safe and enjoyable using a combination of human and artificial intelligence. However, we also encourage our users to report individuals who post inappropriate content and engage in inappropriate behavior. If you believe that another user on Dklist is bothering or defrauding users, please report that user to us so that we can investigate and take necessary action, including blocking the user. Our goal is to keep Dklist free from scammers and spam, making it 100% safe. If you have been defrauded by a user or feel threatened about your personal safety, please contact your local law enforcement immediately.
